## Data Visualization

This dashboard presents an example of a data visualization created in R using student-teacher ratio data from my ***M11-2 Data Analysis Project.***

## Student-Teacher Ratio Dashboard

The chart below compares countries with the highest and lowest student-teacher ratios. This helps show differences in education systems and class-size patterns across countries.


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
![](dashboard_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-1-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::


## Key Takeaways:

-   Countries with higher student-teacher ratios may have larger class sizes.
-   Countries with lower ratios may have more individualized student attention.
-   Data visualization makes it easier to compare education patterns across countries.

## Tools and Approach

R and the tidyverse were used to clean and organize the dataset, allowing for easier analysis. Quarto was used to present the results and visualization in a clear and structured format.
:::
